summary: A goose‑bump inducing show highlighted by a stellar 'Eyes of the World', with generally good sound despite no detailed recording notes.
review: Fans rave about this performance, calling it goose‑bumps worthy and noting that 'Eyes of the World' shines brighter than recent outings. A brief, unexpected horn segment around the 8:35 mark is mentioned but doesn’t mar the overall excitement. No specific audio complaints were recorded, suggesting an acceptable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 5‑star and praise the show strongly; no recording issues are reported, indicating a solid performance with at least decent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard or audience capture, nor note any audio problems, implying the recording is listenable and of acceptable quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic overall with a brief horn intrusion around 8:35 that some listeners found distracting, but it does not detract from the strong performance.
